chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 349 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.1790/2025. 2. For orders on CMA No.1791/2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 30.01.2025 Mr. Tariq Hussain, advocate for the petitioner. 1. Urgency granted. 2. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. This petition has been filed on behalf of association, devoid of any locus standi. Counsel remains unable to demonstrate as to how under Article 199 of the Constitution the petitioner falls within qualification of aggrieved person. Petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
